name: Shoulder Spin
preceding_figure_names: American Spin, Catapult, Change of Places Left to Right, Change of Places Right to Left, Chugging, Rolling Off the Arm
following_figure_names: Change of Places Left to Right, American Spin, Rolling Off the Arm, Miami Special, Chugging, Catapult, Link, Change of Hands Behind Back, Hip Bump, Stop and Go
notes:
Lady must take her weight well forward to lean against Man's hand on her shoulder.
Retain position, placing L hand on Lady's R shoulder. Towards end of step 13, increase tone in L arm and turn Lady L with pressure through L hand. Immediately release L hand contact to R to R hand hold.
Regain L to R or R to R hand hold at end of Lady's turn.

steps.action: Forward chassé LRL, moving left turn 1/8
comments: Gradually raise R arm leading Lady towards R side. Circle R hand counterclockwise towards end of step 5.

steps.action: Compact chassé RLR, end in Open CPP
comments: Lower R arm across back at waist level

steps.action: LF back in Open CPP, no turn
Replace weight to RF in Open CPP, no turn
LF fwd small steps, chassé in CPP LRL, retain position, place left hand on Lady's right shoulder
comments: Towards end of step 13, increase tone in L arm and turn Lady L with pressure through L hand. Immediately release L hand contact to R to R hand hold.

steps.action: Compact chassé RLR, end in Open Position
comments: Regain L to R or R to R hand hold at end of Lady's turn.

steps.action: Forward chassé RLR to Man's right side, then turn underarm on RF
steps.amount_of_turn: 1/8 to L then 3/8 to L on RF
comments: Turn underarm on RF, step count includes 1/8 to L over steps 3-5, then 3/8 to L on RF.

steps.action: Side chassé LRL, end in Open CPP
RF back in Open CPP, no turn
Replace weight to LF in Open CPP, no turn
RF fwd small step, chassé to CPP RLR, turn on RF, then 5/8 to R on RF
comments: No turn during steps 11-13, then 5/8 to R on RF.

steps.action: LF diag back to chassé LRL, end LF back in Open Position
comments: Lady must take her weight well forward to lean against Man's hand on her shoulder.
